whats_new.title: Long identifiers
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 12c Release 2 increases the maximum length of most identifiers from 30 bytes to 128 bytes.

whats_new.title: JSON support enhancements
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 12c Release 2 adds JSON search and query improvements, including JSON data guide support.

whats_new.title: Online table redefinition improvements
whats_new.description: Online redefinition gains restart, rollback, progress monitoring, and broader table support.

whats_new.title: Online conversion to partitioned tables
whats_new.description: Nonpartitioned tables can be converted to partitioned tables online while indexes are maintained and DML continues.

whats_new.title: Online table move
whats_new.description: Nonpartitioned tables can be moved online without blocking concurrent DML, with automatic index maintenance as part of the move.

behavior_changes.title: Grid Infrastructure installation uses zip images
behavior_changes.description: Oracle Grid Infrastructure 12c Release 2 installation media is delivered as a zip image for the installer.

behavior_changes.title: 12.2 upgrade planning requires behavior-change review
behavior_changes.description: Oracle documents 12c Release 2 behavior changes separately from new features so upgrade projects can review compatibility impacts before moving forward.

deprecated.title: 12c Release 2 upgrade changes should be reviewed
deprecated.description: Oracle documents behavior changes, deprecated features, and desupported features for Oracle Database 12c Release 2 upgrade planning.

deprecated.title: Non-CDB architecture deprecated
deprecated.description: Oracle Database 12c Release 2 upgrade documentation identifies the non-CDB architecture as deprecated and directs users toward multitenant architecture planning.
